summary: Verified on the latest realistic origin/main that ADR 0336's public-entrypoint leakage validator is already implemented, that the exact-main branch remains portable after registering a repo-relative ws-0336 worktree, and that the repo automation paths stay green apart from one locally-fallbacked remote-validate ansible-syntax timeout that is preserved as runner evidence instead of being hidden.

verification.check: Exact-main validator and focused regression coverage
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/validate_public_entrypoints.py --check` passed and the focused pytest slice for `tests/test_validate_public_entrypoints.py`, `tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py`, and `tests/test_generate_discovery_artifacts.py` returned `27 passed in 1.50s`.

After the new workstream claimed `docs/diagrams/agent-coordination-map.excalidraw` as a shared generated-truth surface and regenerated the diagram, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces generated-docs`, `uv run --with jsonschema python3 scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, and `git diff --check` all passed.
`make pre-push-gate` passed with every selected blocking check green, including documentation, schema, generated-doc, Ansible, policy, security, and integration lanes.

`make remote-validate` exercised the remote-wrapper path, reported `remote command failed, falling back locally`, and then passed every selected fallback lane except `ansible-syntax`, which timed out after `902.79s`; this is preserved as runner evidence rather than treated as an ADR 0336 functional regression.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` still reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, and a blocked release cut because three unrelated `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts remain open through `2026-04-06`.

notes: ADR 0336 is repository-only; the platform-version field remains not applicable and no live host mutation was required for this closeout.

The branch deliberately kept `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml` untouched; `README.md` only changed later during the mainline archive closeout when canonical truth refreshed the merged-workstream history.
